0760e8bab8c0.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
0760e8bab8c0.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
0760e8bab8c0.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

9317d6272474.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
9317d6272474.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
9317d6272474.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

b7f0dcdd10d6.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
b7f0dcdd10d6.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

d1801f474b79.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
d1801f474b79.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
d1801f474b79.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

b29d1c5f5f6b.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
b29d1c5f5f6b.description: Your 4.5/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
b29d1c5f5f6b.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

1923312d924c.title: Ranked #10 of 10 locally — peers are ahead
1923312d924c.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

13658ae79637.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
13658ae79637.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

4f6b87a15ab6.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
4f6b87a15ab6.description: You trail peers by 1.3 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

c024d835c1c0.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
c024d835c1c0.description: With 426 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
